candidate_install_routes: Candidate official installation route for Raven; verify current documentation, version, license, and platform requirements before use.
Candidate conda/bioconda/container route for Raven; verify package/channel/image source, tag, and license before use.
container_note: Use a pinned environment/container only after verifying official source, license, version tag, and data-mount boundaries.
minimal_fixture: Small public/test contig/read fixture plus database/reference provenance and annotation boundary.
required_run_evidence: exact command line or workflow step
reference/index/database name and version when applicable
input file manifest and sample metadata boundary
logs, warnings, QC metrics, and failure messages
stop_conditions: tool is unavailable in the current environment and no container/install plan is provided
version, command, reference/index, inputs, outputs, or logs are missing
private clinical data or unpublished data lack explicit local handling boundaries
the result is being used to claim mechanism, causality, clinical utility, or publication readiness without independent validation

source_packet_step.required_before_packet: Fill a real run-record JSON from inspected files/logs before creating an OCEAN software source packet.

evidence_boundary: Readiness plan only; not installation, execution, benchmark, or biological validation.
